# ofm_april1_postcensal_estimates_pop_1960-present.xlsx

Postcensal Estimates of April 1 Population, 1960 to Present
Office of Financial Management, Forecasting and Research Division
The tables contained herein represent OFM's postcensal estimates of April 1 population. Postcensal estimates are estimates that reference the prior census point. Data users seeking more consistent data series should use OFM's official April 1 intercensal estimates which can be found at the following location:
April 1 Intercensal Estimates of Population and Housing
Decennial census counts of total population are provided for years 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, and 2020. The census counts may represent federal census counts, corrected federal census counts, special city census counts, or OFM adjusted counts that control for annexations occurring between January 1 and April 1 in decennial census years.
The following symbols are used denote special circumstances regarding a count or an estimate:
*   State-certified special census: A population and housing count that meets all special census certification requirements.
"+  Informal count: A population count that is considered accurate but does not meet all special census certification
   requirements."
"#  Informal census: A population and housing count that is considered accurate but does not meet all special census 
   certification requirements."
"$  Corrected federal census count and/or a revised state estimate based on a corrected federal census count or a federal
   census count adjusted for annexations approved by OFM from January 2, to April 1, in the decennial census year. The 2020 federal census count for Bonney Lake was corrected in 2022."
@ Incorporation base: First Office of Financial Management April 1 estimate after incorporation.
The 1965 population determinations were prepared by the Washington State Census Board.
The 1968 and 1969 population determinations were prepared by the Washington State Planning and Community Affairs Agency.
The 1971 through 1976 population determinations were prepared by the Office of Program Planning and Fiscal Management.
Population determinations from 1977 onwards have been prepared by the Office of Financial Management.
1The population estimates in this series are not revised based on information that becomes available after the estimate date with the exception of 2021.
Last modified: 2024-06-28.
---
